calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6048. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Blair W. Will, Esq. appeared for plaintiff RS Lending, Inc.
Christopher Holden, Senior Director of Assest Management, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Steven C. Ho, Maria Lopez, Miguel Lopez or SF San Bruno, LLC.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on September 12, 2018.
Defendants Steven C. Ho, Maria Lopez, Miguel Lopez filed their respective answers to the complaint on September 21, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant SF San Bruno, LLC on October 1, 2018.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on October 12, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, October 29, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff RS Lending, Inc., and against defendants Steven C. Ho, Maria Lopez, Miguel Lopez and SF San Bruno, LLC, as follows:

Plaintiff RS Lending, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 333 Parnassus Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94117.

Proposed Judgment for Possession Only was submitted to and signed by the Court.
